name: knowledge-base-frontend
description: Knowledge-Base local-first learning route platform frontend MVP.

scripts.test: node scripts/validate-i18n.mjs && node scripts/validate-routes.mjs && node scripts/validate-assets.mjs && node scripts/validate-multisubject-routes.mjs && node scripts/validate-route-cycle-fixtures.mjs && node scripts/validate-source.mjs && node scripts/validate-route-tools.mjs && node scripts/validate-learning-loop.mjs && node scripts/validate-specs.mjs && node scripts/validate-ui-completeness.mjs && node scripts/validate-responsive-readiness.mjs && node scripts/validate-storage-migration.mjs && node scripts/validate-storage-contract.mjs && node scripts/validate-version-ledger.mjs
scripts.quality:local: npm run lint && npm run typecheck && npm run test && npm run build && npm run smoke:pages
scripts.quality:release: npm run quality && npm run audit:high
scripts.flow:all: npm run prehandoff && npm run lint && npm run typecheck && npm run test && npm run build && npm run quality && npm run audit:high && npm run smoke:pages && LUMINA_REGRESSION_CYCLES=3 npm run regression:loop && LUMINA_WINDOW_MAX_CYCLES=1 npm run supervised:window
